title: Gifts
content:
Gifts of one who loved me,--
    'T was high time they came;
    When he ceased to love me,
    Time they stopped for shame.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Ralph Waldo Emerson, titled "Gifts", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
